sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الْأَعْمَالَ تَرْتَبِطُ بِالنِّيَّةِ الصَّادِقَةِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Djela su povezana sa iskrenom namjerom u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: Actions are connected to sincere intention in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, s.a.v.s., je rekao: "Djela se vrednuju prema namjerama" [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: "Actions are but by intentions" [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَقْصِدَ بِعَمَلِهِ وَجْهَ اللهِ تَعَالَى فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Musliman mora svojim djelom ciljati samo Allahovo lice.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim must intend only the sake of Allah the Almighty with his action.

sentences.arabic: إِذَا كَانَتِ النِّيَّةُ صَالِحَةً، قَبِلَ اللهُ الْعَمَلَ وَبَارَكَ فِيهِ.
sentences.translation: Ako je namjera dobra, Allah prima djelo i daje u njemu berket.
sentences.translationEn: If the intention is good, Allah accepts the action and blesses it.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ هُوَ أَسَاسُ الدِّينِ وَمِيزَانُ الْأَفْعَالِ الْبَاطِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis je osnova vjere i mjerilo za unutrašnja djela.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith is the foundation of religion and the scale for internal actions.
